subcodes.first_line: O Ibrahim, Friend of the Merciful! One sacrifice was led to the altar and, though offered up, returned alive; but the Glorious Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابراهیم خلیل الرحمن یک ذبیح بقربانگاه برد فدا آمد و زنده برگشت ولکن حضرت جلیل
subcodes.subjects: @return of the Manifestations of God, @Imam Husayn, @martyrs and martyrdom, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
